what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board item via YAML frontmatter.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is a board URI: board://item-61a3194a.
standouts: The target uses a custom board:// URI scheme.
There is no descriptive text or payload beyond metadata.
concerns: The file's purpose is opaque without resolving the referenced board item.
No author, reason, or content is recorded for the attachment.
notes: A bare metadata stub that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or discussion does board://item-61a3194a represent?
What does the 'board_items' attachment_type imply about the relationship?

apparent_themes: cross-referencing channel memory with board items
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel memory artifact and a board item.
contribution: A structured, timestamped attachment record that preserves a link between a channel memory entry and a board item.
